restarter.server_unhealthy_kick_reason: the server needs to be restarted, please reconnect
restarter.partial_hang_warn: Due to a partial hang, this server will restart in 1 minute. Please disconnect now.
restarter.partial_hang_warn_discord: Due to a partial hang, **%{servername}** will restart in 1 minute.
restarter.schedule_warn: This server is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minute. Please disconnect now. |||| This server is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minutes.
restarter.schedule_warn_discord: **%{servername}** is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minute. |||| **%{servername}** is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minutes.

ban_messages.kick_temporary: (%{author}) You have been banned from this server for "%{reason}". Your ban will expire in: %{expiration}.
ban_messages.kick_permanent: (%{author}) You have been permanently banned from this server for "%{reason}".

reject.title_permanent: You have been permanently banned from this server.
reject.title_temporary: You have been temporarily banned from this server.
reject.note_multiple_bans: Note: you have more than one active ban on your identifiers.
reject.note_diff_license: Note: the ban above was applied for another license, which means some of your IDs/HWIDs match the ones associated with that ban.

admin_only.insufficient_ids: You do not have discord or fivem identifiers, and at least one of them is required to validate if you are a sxPanel administrator.
admin_only.deny_message: Your identifiers are not assigned to any sxPanel administrator.

guild_member.mode_title: This server is in Discord server Member Whitelist mode.
guild_member.insufficient_ids: You do not have the discord identifier, which is required to validate if you have joined our Discord server. Please open the Discord Desktop app and try again (the Web app won't work).
guild_member.deny_title: You are required to join our Discord server to connect.
guild_member.deny_message: Please join the guild %{guildname} then try again.

guild_roles.mode_title: This server is in Discord Role Whitelist mode.
guild_roles.insufficient_ids: You do not have the discord identifier, which is required to validate if you have joined our Discord server. Please open the Discord Desktop app and try again (the Web app won't work).
guild_roles.deny_notmember_title: You are required to join our Discord server to connect.
guild_roles.deny_notmember_message: Please join %{guildname}, get one of the required roles, then try again.
guild_roles.deny_noroles_title: You do not have a whitelisted role required to join.
guild_roles.deny_noroles_message: To join this server you are required to have at least one of the whitelisted roles on the guild %{guildname}.

approved_license.mode_title: This server is in License Whitelist mode.
approved_license.insufficient_ids: You do not have the license identifier, which means the server has sv_lan enabled. If you are the server owner, you can disable it in the server.cfg file.
approved_license.deny_title: You are not whitelisted to join this server.

nui_warning.title: WARNING
nui_warning.stale_message: This warning was issued before you connected to the server.
nui_warning.instruction: Hold %{key} for %{smart_count} second to dismiss this message. |||| Hold %{key} for %{smart_count} seconds to dismiss this message.

misc.help_message:
sxPanel Menu enabled, type /tx to open it.
You can also configure a keybind at [Game Settings > Key Bindings > FiveM > Menu: Open Main Page].
misc.menu_not_admin:
Your identifiers do not match any admin registered on sxPanel.
If you are registered on sxPanel, go to Admin Manager and make sure your identifiers are saved.
misc.menu_auth_failed: sxPanel Menu authentication failed with reason: %{reason}
misc.two_factor_required: Two-factor authentication is required. Enable 2FA in the web panel Account settings before using the in-game menu.
misc.temp_password_required: You must change your temporary password in the web panel before using the in-game menu.
misc.no_perms: You do not have this permission.
misc.no_perms_action: You do not have permission to %{action} players.
misc.not_enabled: The sxPanel Menu is not enabled! You can enable it in the sxPanel settings page.
misc.dialog_empty_input: You cannot have an empty input.
misc.onesync_error: This option requires OneSync to be enabled.
misc.redm_not_available: This option is not yet available for RedM.
misc.csrf_alert: ATTENTION! txAdmin received a NUI message from the origin "%{origin}" which is not approved. This likely means that that resource is vulnerable to XSS which has been exploited to inject txAdmin commands. It is recommended that you fix the vulnerability or remove that resource completely. For more information: https://discord.gg/hUM3pQeGFc.
misc.ctx_timeout: Timed out loading server context after %{ms} ms

chat.tx_description: Opens the main sxPanel Menu or specific page for a player.
chat.tx_arg_help: (Optional) Open player modal for specific ID or name.
chat.tx_reauth: Retries to authenticate the menu NUI.
chat.goto_description: Teleport to a player by their server ID.
chat.goto_arg_help: The server ID of the target player.
chat.tpm_description: Teleport to the waypoint set on the map.
chat.ban_description: Open the ban modal for a player.
chat.ban_arg_help: The server ID or name of the target player.
chat.kick_description: Open the kick dialog for a player.
chat.kick_arg_help: The server ID or name of the target player.
chat.warn_description: Open the warn dialog for a player.
chat.warn_arg_help: The server ID or name of the target player.
chat.report_description: Open the support ticket UI (alias for /ticket).

frozen.was_frozen: You have been frozen by a server admin!

tooltips.tooltip_1: Use %{key} to switch pages & the arrow keys to navigate menu items
tooltips.tooltip_2: Certain menu items have sub options which can be selected using the left & right arrow keys

noclip.title: NoClip
noclip.label: Toggle NoClip, allowing you to move through walls and other objects

godmode.title: God
godmode.label: Toggle invincibility, preventing you from taking damage

superjump.title: Super Jump
superjump.label: Toggle super jump mode, the player will also run faster

normal.title: Normal
normal.label: Returns yourself back to the default/normal player mode

waypoint.title: Waypoint
waypoint.label: Teleport to the custom waypoint set on the map

coords.title: Coords
coords.label: Teleport to the provided coordinates
coords.dialog_desc: Provide coordinates in an x, y, z format to go through the wormhole.
coords.dialog_error: Invalid coordinates. Must be in the format of: 111, 222, 33

back.title: Back
back.label: Returns to the location prior to last teleport
back.error: You don't have a last location to go back to!

copy.title: Copy Coords
copy.label: Copy the current world coordinates to your clipboard

goto.invalid_id: Invalid player ID. Must be a number.

vehicle.title: Vehicle
vehicle.not_in_veh_error: You are not currently in a vehicle!

spawn.title: Spawn
spawn.label: Spawn a given vehicle from its model name
spawn.dialog_desc: Enter in the model name of the vehicle you want to spawn.
spawn.dialog_error: The vehicle model name '%{modelName}' does not exist!
spawn.load_failed: Failed to spawn vehicle: model '%{modelName}' did not load in time.

fix.title: Fix
fix.label: Will repair the vehicle to its maximum health

delete.title: Delete
delete.label: Deletes the vehicle the player is currently in

boost.title: Boost
boost.label: Boost the car to achieve max fun (and maybe speed)
boost.unsupported_class: This vehicle class is not supported.
boost.redm_not_mounted: You can only boost when mounted on a horse.

myself.title: Myself
myself.label: Will heal yourself to the current ped's maximum
myself.success_1: You should be feeling good now!

everyone.title: Everyone
everyone.label: Will heal & revive all connected players

radius.title: Radius
radius.label: Will heal & revive players within a radius
radius.dialog_desc: Enter the radius (in units) to heal nearby players
radius.dialog_error: Invalid radius. Must be between 1 and 500.
radius.success: Healed players within the specified radius.

announcement.title: Send Announcement
announcement.label: Send an announcement to all online players.
announcement.dialog_desc: Enter the message you want to broadcast to all players.

clear_area.title: Reset World Area
clear_area.label: Reset a specified world area to its default state
clear_area.dialog_desc: Please enter the radius where you wish to reset entities in (0-300). This will not clear entities spawned server side.

player_ids.title: Toggle Player IDs
player_ids.label: Toggle showing player IDs (and other info) above the head of all nearby players

map_blips.title: Toggle Map Blips
map_blips.label: Show all online players on the in-game map and minimap
map_blips.alert_onesync: Map blips require OneSync to be enabled on the server.

misc.error: An error occurred fetching this users details. The error is shown below:

defaults.configurable_embed_description: You can configure this embed in `sxPanel > Settings > Discord Bot`.

errors.invalid_url_details:
Every URL must start with one of (`http://`, `https://`, `discord://`).
URLs cannot be empty, if you do not want a URL then remove the URL line.
errors.invalid_placeholder_details:
Your URL starts with `{{`, try removing it.
If you just tried to edit a placeholder like `{{serverBrowserUrl}}` or `{{serverJoinUrl}}`, remember that those placeholders are replaced automatically by sxPanel, meaning you do not need to edit them at all.
errors.invalid_emoji_details:
All emojis must be one of:
- UTF-8 emoji ('😄')
- Valid emoji ID ('1062339910654246964')
- Discord custom emoji (`<:name:id>` or `<a:name:id>`).
To get the full emoji code, insert it into discord, and add `\` before it then send the message
errors.invalid_status_color: Invalid status color `%{value}`. Use a hex value like `#0BA70B`.
errors.footer_object: Embed footer must be an object.
errors.footer_text: Embed footer text must be a non-empty string.
errors.author_object: Embed author must be an object.
errors.author_name: Embed author name must be a non-empty string.
errors.fields_array: Embed fields must be an array.
errors.field_name: Embed field name must be a non-empty string.
errors.field_value: Embed field value must be a non-empty string.
errors.field_inline: Embed field inline must be a boolean.
errors.embed_object: Embed JSON must resolve to an object.
errors.title_string: Embed title must be a string.
errors.description_string: Embed description must be a string.
errors.invalid_button_config:
Invalid button in Discord Status Embed Config.
All buttons must have:
- Label: string, not empty
- URL: string, not empty, valid URL
errors.button_label_empty: Button label must resolve to a non-empty string.

setup.title: Server Setup
setup.subtitle: Follow the steps below to set up your server.

server_name.title: Server Name
server_name.description: Choose a name for your server. This can be changed later in Settings.

deployment_type.title: Deployment Type
deployment_type.description: How would you like to set up your server?
deployment_type.popular_desc: Choose from a list of popular community recipes.
deployment_type.local_desc: Point to an existing server data folder with a server.cfg.
deployment_type.remote_desc: Provide a URL to a recipe YAML file.
deployment_type.custom_desc: Start with a blank recipe and paste your own in the deployer.

popular.title: Select a Template
popular.timeout: Request timed out while loading recipes.

remote.title: Remote Template URL
remote.description: Paste the URL of a recipe YAML file (must be a raw URL).
remote.untrusted_description: A recipe is executable configuration (including SQL). Only load templates from sources you trust. Arbitrary URLs or third-party raw files can compromise your server or database if the YAML is malicious.

local.title: Existing Server Data Folder
local.description: Provide the path to your existing server data folder (containing server.cfg and resources/).

custom.title: Custom Template
custom.description: You will be able to paste or write your own recipe YAML in the deployer editor on the next page.
custom.docs_prefix: For recipe documentation and examples, check the

deploy_target.title: Deploy Target
deploy_target.description: Where should the server data be deployed?
deploy_target.custom_path_hint: This path is based on your custom data path configuration.

server_cfg.title: Server CFG File
server_cfg.description: Provide the server.cfg file name (relative to your data folder).

review.title: Review Recipe
review.untrusted_body: This recipe is from an untrusted source. Review the contents carefully before proceeding.
review.name: Name:
review.author: Author:

input.title: Recipe Variables
input.autofilled: Some fields have been auto-filled from your host configuration.
input.delete_existing: Delete existing database if it exists (use with caution!)
input.github_hint: Required to download private recipe resources.

run.title: Running Recipe
run.failed: Deployment failed. Check the log above.
run.connection_lost: Lost connection to the server after multiple retries.

configure.title: Configure server.cfg
configure.description: Review your server.cfg below. Make any final adjustments before saving.

cfg.title: CFG Editor
cfg.small_file_warning: Your CFG file is very small - there is a good chance you deleted something you shouldn't. A backup file will be saved just in case.
cfg.errors_banner: Server failed to start due to config error(s):
cfg.errors_hint: Fix the issues above and save the file, then try starting the server again.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Inspect runtime health, process state, and support data.

system_log_page.title: Console Log
system_log_page.description: Raw sxPanel process output, including startup and debug messages.
system_log_page.end_of_log: [END OF LOG - REFRESH THE PAGE TO LOAD MORE]

toasts.server_name_too_big: The Server Name is too big.

deferral_studio.select_element_hint: Select an element on the card or in the layers list to edit it.
deferral_studio.custom_placeholders_footer: Custom placeholders are configured on the
deferral_studio.custom_text_placeholder: Write anything — plain text or HTML. Use {requestId}, {customMessage}, or your placeholders.
deferral_studio.no_image_yet: No image yet. SVG up to %{svgKb} KB; PNG/GIF up to %{pngKb} KB each (GIF animates).
deferral_studio.logo_drag_hint: Drag to reposition. Toggle visibility with the layer list or the global watermark switch.
deferral_studio.discard_scenario_message: has unsaved edits. Discard them and continue?
deferral_studio.leave_unsaved_suffix: Leave anyway? Only saved cards are kept on the server.

deferral_studio.cannot_restore_msg: Addon scenarios use the addon default template — re-save from the addon manifest.
deferral_studio.save_failed_no_response: No response from server (timeout or connection lost).
deferral_studio.scenario_saved_msg: This card is saved on the server.

canvas.blank_hint: Select a scenario to load its default layout

button_editor.label: Button label
button_editor.hint: Opens in the player's browser when they click during connection. Use http/https only; placeholders like {discordInvite} work.

placeholders_editor.addon_desc: Resolved at connect time by the owning addon. Use in any block as
placeholders_editor.empty: Define extra static tokens and use {key} in any block.

text.label: Text line
text.description: Single line (use one per sentence or field)

paragraph.label: Paragraph
paragraph.default_content: Please join {guildName} and request to be whitelisted.

custom_text.label: Custom text
custom_text.description: Freeform text — write anything; supports placeholders and basic HTML

request_id.label: Request ID
request_id.description: Shows the player request ID when available

ban_id.label: Ban ID
ban_id.description: Shows the active ban action ID

ban_reason.label: Ban reason
ban_reason.description: Shows the ban reason ({banReason}) when the player is banned

ban_expires.label: Ban expiry
ban_expires.description: Shows time until ban expires ({banExpires}); hidden for permanent bans

custom_image.label: Custom image
custom_image.description: Upload SVG, PNG, or GIF — shown on the deferral card

button.label: Button (link)
button.description: Clickable link styled as a button — opens in the player's browser (http/https only)

ban_temporary.label: Ban — temporary
ban_temporary.description: Shown when the player has an active timed ban.

ban_permanent.label: Ban — permanent
ban_permanent.description: Shown when the player has a permanent ban.

whitelist_pending.label: Whitelist — pending approval
whitelist_pending.description: Manual review: player is not on the list; includes request ID when enabled.

whitelist_schedule_closed.label: Whitelist — applications closed
whitelist_schedule_closed.description: Join attempted outside configured application windows.

whitelist_admin_denied.label: Whitelist — admin-only denied
whitelist_admin_denied.description: Maintenance mode: player is not a panel administrator.

whitelist_admin_insufficient_ids.label: Whitelist — admin-only missing IDs
whitelist_admin_insufficient_ids.description: Maintenance mode: missing license or Discord identifier.

whitelist_discord_member_denied.label: Whitelist — not in Discord
whitelist_discord_member_denied.description: Discord member workflow: user is not in the guild.

whitelist_discord_member_insufficient_id.label: Whitelist — Discord member missing ID
whitelist_discord_member_insufficient_id.description: Discord member workflow: no discord: identifier.

whitelist_discord_roles_not_member.label: Whitelist — roles: not in guild
whitelist_discord_roles_not_member.description: Discord roles workflow: user is not in the guild.

whitelist_discord_roles_no_roles.label: Whitelist — roles: missing role
whitelist_discord_roles_no_roles.description: Discord roles workflow: member lacks a required role.

whitelist_discord_roles_insufficient_ids.label: Whitelist — roles: missing ID
whitelist_discord_roles_insufficient_ids.description: Discord roles workflow: no discord: identifier.

whitelist_insufficient_license.label: Whitelist — missing license
whitelist_insufficient_license.description: Manual review: no license identifier on connect.

whitelist_error.label: Whitelist — validation error
whitelist_error.description: Discord or internal validation failed while checking whitelist.

connection_queue.label: Connection queue
connection_queue.description: Placeholder for server queue / deferral messaging (hook up from your queue resource).

access_denied.label: Access denied (generic)
access_denied.description: Fallback card when no specific scenario is matched.

settings.discard_unsaved_message: You have unsaved changes in the %{cardTitle} tab.
settings.discard_confirm: Are you sure you want to discard them?

server_name.label: Server Name
server_name.desc: A short server name to be used in the sxPanel interface and Server/Discord messages.
server_name.desc_length: The name must be between 1 and 18 characters.

language.label: Language
language.desc: The language to use on Chat/Discord messages.
language.desc_custom: You can customize the phrases/words by using the Custom option.
language.desc_docs: For more information, please read the documentation.

allow_self_identifier_edit.label: Allow Self Identifier Edit
allow_self_identifier_edit.desc_enabled: When enabled, all admins can change their own identifiers (FiveM & Discord) from the Account dialog.
allow_self_identifier_edit.desc_disabled: When disabled, only admins with the Manage Admins permission can edit identifiers.

require_admin_two_factor.label: Require Two-Factor Authentication
require_admin_two_factor.desc: When required, every admin — including the master account — must enable 2FA before using the web panel or in-game menu.
require_admin_two_factor.desc_master: You must enable 2FA on your own account before turning this on. Only the master admin can change this setting.

bans.checking_desc: Enable checking for ban status on player join.
bans.checking_note: sxPanel bans will not work if this option is disabled.
bans.templates_desc: Configure ban reasons and durations that will appear as dropdown options when banning a player.
bans.rejection_placeholder: You can join http://discord.gg/example to appeal this ban.
bans.rejection_desc: Optional message to display to a player on the rejection message that shows when they try to connect while being banned.
bans.rejection_appeal: If you have a ban appeal process, you can use this field to inform the players.
bans.hwid_desc: This option configures how many HWID tokens must match between a player and an existing ban for the player join to be blocked, or can disable HWID Bans entirely.
bans.hwid_note: Note: Most players have 3 to 6 HWID tokens.
bans.rejection_too_big_title: The Ban Rejection Message is too big.
bans.rejection_too_big_msg: The message must be 512 characters or less.

deferral.about_desc: HTML cards shown to players during FiveM connection deferrals — bans, whitelist denials, queue messages, and other join blocks.
deferral.body_too_long_title: Deferral body template is too long.
deferral.discord_invite_desc: Used for the built-in {discordInvite} token in any card block.
deferral.custom_placeholders_desc: Extra static tokens for card text — use {key} in the studio. The same placeholders apply to every scenario.
deferral.studio_desc: Visual editor with a FiveM-sized canvas — pick a scenario, drag blocks, toggle the watermark logo per card, and export or import layouts.
deferral.import_export_desc: Share full deferral card configs between servers or backups.

deferral_editor.enable_visual_title: Convert this scenario to the visual block editor. Your current title and body become draggable blocks.
deferral_editor.body_placeholder: Use {customMessage} for dynamic text from the server.

danger_zone.master_admin_warning: You must be the Master Admin to use the options below.
danger_zone.web_only_warning: These functions are disabled for the in-game menu - please use the web version.
danger_zone.revoke_desc: Revoke whitelist from players that haven't joined recently. Only applies to license whitelist - not Discord member or role whitelist.
danger_zone.wl_filter_30d: players that haven't joined in the last 30 days
danger_zone.wl_filter_15d: players that haven't joined in the last 15 days
danger_zone.wl_filter_7d: players that haven't joined in the last 7 days
danger_zone.clean_desc_prefix: Permanently remove players and actions from the database. This action is
danger_zone.clean_irreversible_warning: this action is irreversible. Save a database backup first.
danger_zone.players_help: Remove players based on time since last connection. Does not affect players with notes, bans, warns, or whitelist logs.
danger_zone.hwids_help_prefix: HWID tokens are tied to your
danger_zone.hwids_help_suffix: owner. Wipe if transferring to a different license key owner.
danger_zone.confirm_title: Are you sure you want to:
danger_zone.select_one_option: You need to select at least one option.
danger_zone.revoke_inactive: Revoke Whitelist from all players that have not joined in the past %{filter}.
danger_zone.telemetry_desc: When collection is enabled, sxPanel periodically sends anonymous install statistics (panel version, player slot usage, coarse region, resource folder names). No player names, licenses, or chat content are transmitted.

embed_editor.intro_status: Customize the server status card and its config (colors, buttons, player templates). Use preset mode for a visual editor or raw JSON for full control.
embed_editor.intro_player_list: Customize the player list card and paging settings. Use preset mode for a visual editor or raw JSON for full control.
embed_editor.placeholders_copy_hint: Expand and use the copy button next to each token.
embed_editor.preview_sample_note: Preview uses sample server and player data in place of placeholders.
embed_editor.preview_invalid_json: Fix JSON syntax to update the preview.
embed_editor.intro: The %{embedLabel} is customizable by editing the JSON below.
embed_editor.intro_placeholders: You can use the placeholders to include dynamic server information in the embed, button URLs, and player line templates.
embed_editor.player_list_alert: Player-list paging and compact columns are configured in the Config JSON with playerColumnCount, playersPerColumn, playerColumnTemplate, showPagerButtons, and pagerPageLabelTemplate.

placeholders.serverCfxId: The Cfx.re id of your server, this is tied to your sv_licenseKey and detected at runtime.
placeholders.serverJoinUrl: The direct join URL of your server. Example: https://cfx.re/join/xxxxxx.
placeholders.serverBrowserUrl: The FiveM Server browser URL of your server. Example: https://servers.fivem.net/servers/detail/xxxxxx.
placeholders.serverEndpoint: The live FXServer connect endpoint in ip:port form detected from the running server config.
placeholders.serverIp: The host portion of the detected FXServer endpoint.
placeholders.serverPort: The port portion of the detected FXServer endpoint.
placeholders.serverConnectCommand: A ready-to-paste F8 command using the detected endpoint. Example: connect 127.0.0.1:30120.
placeholders.serverAvailableSlots: How many open player slots are left based on the current online count and max clients.
placeholders.serverClients: The number of players online in your server.
placeholders.serverMaxClients: The sv_maxclients of your server, detected at runtime.
placeholders.serverOccupancyPercent: The current player occupancy percentage, including the % suffix.
placeholders.serverName: This is the sxPanel-given name for this server. Can be changed in sxPanel > Settings > Global.
placeholders.statusColor: A hex-encoded color, from the Config JSON.
placeholders.statusString: A text to be displayed with the server status, from the Config JSON.
placeholders.uptime: For how long is the server online. Example: 1 hr, 50 mins.
placeholders.nextScheduledRestart: String with when is the next scheduled restart. Example: in 2 hrs, 48 mins.
placeholders.recentJoinCount: How many player joins were recorded in the recent rolling window tracked by sxPanel.
placeholders.recentLeaveCount: How many player leaves were recorded in the recent rolling window tracked by sxPanel.
placeholders.playerList: A multiline rendered player list for the current page using the player line template from the Config JSON.
placeholders.playerListColumns: Expands a single embed field into compact inline roster columns for the current player-list page.
placeholders.playerListInline: A compact rendered player list for the current page using the inline player template from the Config JSON.
placeholders.playerListSummary: A short summary of how many players are online right now.
placeholders.playerListTotalPages: The total amount of available player-list pages.
placeholders.playerListPageSummary: A short summary of the current player-list page range. Example: Page 2/3 • Showing 31-60.

player_placeholders.index: 1-based player position in the rendered list.
player_placeholders.displayName: The current display name shown in the sxPanel player list.
player_placeholders.pureName: The raw player name before tag decorations.
player_placeholders.playTimeMinutes: The player playtime stored by sxPanel, in minutes.
player_placeholders.playTime: A human-readable version of the player playtime stored by sxPanel. Example: 48 mins.
player_placeholders.sessionTimeSeconds: How many seconds the player has been connected in the current server session.
player_placeholders.sessionTimeMinutes: How many minutes the player has been connected in the current server session.
player_placeholders.sessionTime: A human-readable session duration for the player. Example: 1 hr, 16 mins.
player_placeholders.tags: The player tags computed by sxPanel, joined by commas.

whitelist.enabled_desc: When disabled, join checks skip whitelist (banlist may still apply). Configure the active workflow below.

auto_admin.title: Admin-only (maintenance)
auto_admin.desc: Only sxPanel administrators with linked fivem/discord identifiers may join.

auto_discord_member.title: Discord server member
auto_discord_member.desc: Player must have a discord: identifier and be in the configured Discord guild.

auto_discord_role.title: Discord server roles
auto_discord_role.desc: Player must be in the guild and have at least one configured role.

manual_review.title: Manual review (license)
manual_review.desc: Unlisted players receive a request ID on the deferral card; staff approve in the Whitelist page or Discord.

external_whitelist.title: External whitelist
external_whitelist.desc: sxPanel does not block joins — use your own allowlist resource or service. Server browser padlock and instructions apply while this mode is selected.

whitelist.browser_instructions_placeholder: Join our Discord at discord.gg/example to apply for the allowlist.
whitelist.browser_instructions_desc: Shown in the server browser while whitelist is enabled. Sets sv_allowlistInstructions (plain text, max 512 characters). The allowlist padlock (sv_appearAllowlisted) turns on automatically with whitelist.
whitelist.discord_review_channel_desc: New join requests open a thread here. React with ✅ or ❌ on the thread message to approve or deny.
whitelist.discord_roles_desc: Comma-separated role snowflakes. Requires Discord Bot enabled.
whitelist.deferral_cards_desc_prefix: Customize join denial cards, placeholders, and layouts on the
whitelist.schedule_desc: When enabled, new join requests are only accepted during the configured windows (server timezone).
whitelist.manage_desc: Approve players and view analytics on the Whitelist page or via /whitelist Discord commands.
whitelist.toast_discord_bot_required_msg: Enable the Discord Bot in the Discord tab for Discord-based workflows.
whitelist.toast_discord_roles_required_msg: Add at least one Discord role ID for the Discord roles workflow.
whitelist.toast_instructions_required_msg: Enter server browser instructions whenever whitelist is enabled.
whitelist.toast_instructions_too_long_msg: Keep instructions at 512 characters or fewer.
whitelist.toast_schedule_windows_msg: Add at least one open window when the application schedule is enabled.
whitelist.toast_invalid_review_channel_msg: Use a valid channel snowflake ID.

queue.enabled_desc: Role-based join queue with slot pools and priority. Separate from Whitelist.
queue.max_users_desc: Maximum players that can wait in the queue at once. When full, new connections skip the queue and use the normal join flow.
queue.slot_summary_one: 1 slot reserved across 1 pool. Remaining capacity is the public pool.
queue.slot_summary_many: %{count} slots reserved across %{poolCount} pools. Remaining capacity is the public pool.
queue.staff_pool_on: Panel staff can use this pool
queue.add_roles_first: Add Discord roles to this rule first
queue.pool_rules_desc: Players matching a linked rule's Discord roles may use this pool when public slots are full. Staff with the toggle above can also use it.
queue.add_rules_hint: Add queue rules below, then link them to this pool.
queue.empty_pools: No slot pools yet. Example: 8 slots staff-only, 20 slots for donators + staff.
queue.empty_rules: Define roles for queue priority, then assign them to slot pools above.
queue.toast_rule_label_required: Each queue rule needs a label.
queue.toast_pool_label_required: Each slot pool needs a label.
queue.toast_discord_bot_required_msg: Enable the Discord Bot in the Discord tab to use role-based queue rules.
queue.toast_pool_needs_access: Pool "%{label}" needs staff access and/or at least one queue rule.
queue.toast_pool_rule_no_roles: Pool "%{poolLabel}": linked rule "%{ruleLabel}" has no Discord roles.

player_tags.threshold_desc: Players with less than this many minutes of total playtime will receive the Newcomer tag. Set to 0 to disable.
player_tags.tags_desc: Built-in tags (Staff, Problematic, Newcomer) can be enabled/disabled and customized (label, color, priority) but cannot be deleted. Define up to 20 additional custom tags for identifying players (e.g. Streamer, VIP). Tags are assigned via resource exports: exports.txadmin:addPlayerTag(serverId, tagId) and exports.txadmin:removePlayerTag(serverId, tagId). Lower priority number = higher importance (1 is highest priority, 100 is lowest).
player_tags.auto_tag_staff: Shown on anyone who has an sxPanel admin account.
player_tags.auto_tag_problematic: Shown on anyone with an active (non-revoked) ban or warning.
player_tags.auto_tag_newplayer: Shown on anyone with less than the threshold minutes of total playtime.
player_tags.discord_roles_desc: Players with any of these Discord roles receive this tag on join. Requires Discord Bot enabled. Tags are re-synced when roles change while online.
player_tags.toast_missing_id: Each custom tag must have an ID.

discord_roles_picker.manual_placeholder: Paste role IDs separated by commas, spaces, or new lines

game_menu.menu_desc: When enabled, admins will be able to open the menu by typing /tx or using the keybind configured in the FiveM/RedM settings.
game_menu.panel_tab_desc: When enabled, the in-game menu shows a Panel tab that opens the full web panel without leaving the game.
game_menu.align_right_desc: Move menu to the right side of the screen.
game_menu.page_key_placeholder: click here and use the key to change
game_menu.page_key_desc: The key used to to switch tabs in the menu.
game_menu.page_key_desc_click: Click above and press any key to change the configuration.
game_menu.player_id_distance_desc: Maximum distance (in meters) at which overhead player IDs are visible when toggled on. Valid range: 1–1000.
game_menu.overhead_two_row_desc: When enabled (FiveM only), row 1 shows the tag prefix and native icons; row 2 shows the player name, server ID, and distance.
game_menu.overhead_seat_icons_desc: Show native driver and front-passenger icons on overhead tags when players are in vehicles (FiveM only). Rear seats use text suffixes BL/BR.
game_menu.overhead_noclip_icon_desc: Show the native passive-mode icon on overhead tags when an admin is in noclip (FiveM only). Visible to other admins with overhead IDs enabled.
game_menu.player_mode_effect_desc: Play a particle effect and sound when an admin uses NoClip, God Mode, etc.
game_menu.player_mode_effect_warning: This options help prevent admin abuse during PvP by making it visible/audible to all players that an admin is using a special mode. We recommend keeping it enabled.

game_notifications.hide_admin_punishments_desc: Never show to the players the admin name on Bans or Warns.
game_notifications.hide_admin_punishments_note: This information will still be available in the history and logs.
game_notifications.hide_admin_messages_desc: Do not show the admin name on Announcements or DMs.
game_notifications.hide_admin_messages_note: This information will still be available in the live console and logs.
game_notifications.hide_announcement_desc: Suppresses the display of announcements, allowing you to implement your own announcement via the event txAdmin:events:announcement.
game_notifications.hide_dm_desc: Suppresses the display of direct messages, allowing you to implement your own direct message notification via the event txAdmin:events:playerDirectMessage.
game_notifications.hide_warning_desc: Suppresses the display of warnings, allowing you to implement your own warning via the event txAdmin:events:playerWarned.
game_notifications.hide_restart_desc: Suppresses the display of scheduled restart warnings, allowing you to implement your own warning via the event txAdmin:events:scheduledRestart.

game_reports.tickets_desc: When enabled, players can use the /ticket command to submit support tickets that admins can review in the Tickets page.
game_reports.categories_placeholder: Player Report, Bug Report, Question, Other
game_reports.categories_desc: Comma-separated list of ticket categories players can choose from.
game_reports.priority_desc: Allow players to set a priority level (Low, Medium, High, Critical) when submitting a ticket.
game_reports.feedback_desc: When a ticket is resolved, prompt the player to rate their support experience.
game_reports.retention_desc: How many days to keep resolved/closed tickets before they are automatically deleted. Default is 30 days.
game_reports.discord_channel_desc: When set, new tickets will create a Discord thread in this channel (requires Discord integration to be enabled).
game_reports.toast_retention_invalid: Retention days must be a number between 1 and 365.

discord_oauth.client_id_desc: The Client/Application ID from your Discord application. Required alongside the Client Secret to enable the "Login with Discord" button on the login page.
discord_oauth.client_id_portal: Get it from the Discord Developer Portal under your application's OAuth2 settings.
discord_oauth.client_id_note: You can reuse the same application as your bot.
discord_oauth.client_secret_desc: The Client Secret from your Discord application's OAuth2 page.
discord_oauth.client_secret_redirect: You must add <your-panel-url>/login/discord/callback as a redirect URL in the Discord Developer Portal.

fxserver.data_folder_desc: The full path of the folder that contains the resources folder, usually it's the same place that contains your server.cfg.
fxserver.data_folder_reset_note: Resetting this value will allow you to go back to the Setup page, without deleting any files.
fxserver.restart_schedule_desc: At which times of day to restart the server.
fxserver.restart_schedule_note: Make sure your schedule matches your server time and not your local time.
fxserver.restart_schedule_empty: No schedule set. Click on the + button to add a time.
fxserver.timezone_warning: Your server timezone is set to %{serverTz}, but your browser timezone is %{browserTz}. Make sure to configure the time according to the server timezone.
fxserver.restart_interval_desc: Restart the server every N hours (based on uptime). Set to 0 to disable.
fxserver.restart_interval_both: If both a schedule and an interval are set, whichever comes first will trigger the restart.
fxserver.quiet_mode_desc: Do not print FXServer's output to the terminal.
fxserver.quiet_mode_console: You will still be able to use the Live Console.
fxserver.quiet_mode_locked: This setting is locked and cannot be changed.
fxserver.cfg_path_desc: The path to your server config file, probably named server.cfg.
fxserver.cfg_path_relative: This can either be absolute, or relative to the Server Data folder.
fxserver.startup_args_desc: Additional command-line arguments to pass to the FXServer instance such as NodeJS CLI flags.
fxserver.startup_args_warning: You almost certainly should not use this option, commands and convars should be placed in your server.cfg instead.
fxserver.onesync_desc: Most servers should be using OneSync On.
fxserver.onesync_deprecated: The other options are considered deprecated and should not be used unless you know what you're doing. For more information, please read the documentation.
fxserver.autostart_desc: Start the server automatically after sxPanel starts.
fxserver.resource_tolerance_desc: At server boot, how much time to wait for any single resource to start before restarting the server.
fxserver.resource_tolerance_note: If you are getting failed to start in time errors, increase this value.
fxserver.disable_health_check_desc: When enabled, sxPanel does not use the game HTTP API for server status or player list polling.
fxserver.disable_health_check_note: When off, player counts are read from the game port, the optional host override below, and the public server listing.
fxserver.http_playerlist_host_desc: Optional host:port for the player HTTP endpoint when it is not reachable on localhost (e.g. public connect address). Leave empty to auto-detect.
fxserver.log_retention_desc: How many days of historical server log sessions to keep. Sessions older than this are automatically deleted.
fxserver.hide_update_desc: Permanently hide the FxServer update notification banner for all admins.
fxserver.toast_data_path_required_title: The Server Data Folder is required.
fxserver.toast_data_path_required_msg: If you want to return to the Setup page, click on the "Reset" button instead.
fxserver.toast_cfg_path_required_title: The CFG File Path is required.
fxserver.toast_onesync_args_title: You cannot set OneSync in Startup Arguments.
fxserver.toast_onesync_args_msg: Please use the selectbox below it.
fxserver.reset_dialog_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset the server data path?
fxserver.reset_dialog_no_delete: This will not delete any resource files or database, but just reset the sxPanel configuration, allowing you to go back to the Setup page.
fxserver.reset_dialog_restore: If you want, you can set the path back to the current value later.
fxserver.reset_dialog_warning: take note of the current path before proceeding, so you can set it back later if you need to. Current path:

discord_bot.token_desc_guides: To get a token and the bot to join your server, follow these two guides:
discord_bot.token_note_reuse: Do not reuse the same token for another bot.
discord_bot.token_note_intent: The bot requires the Server Members intent, which can be set at the Discord Developer Portal.
discord_bot.guild_desc: The ID of the Discord Server (also known as Discord Guild).
discord_bot.guild_dev_mode: To get the Server ID, go to Discord's settings and enable developer mode, then right-click on the guild icon select "Copy ID".
discord_bot.logging_desc: Configure the warnings channel, one shared log guild override, per-route channel selection, and advanced per-entry log filters in a dedicated editor page.
discord_bot.presence_interval_desc: Controls how often the bot refreshes the live activity text from sxPanel.
discord_bot.mapping_roles_desc: Paste one or more Discord role IDs or role mentions. Separate entries with commas, spaces, or new lines.
discord_bot.mapping_preset_desc: Matching Discord roles sync this preset's permissions onto linked admin accounts.
discord_bot.mapping_empty: No role mappings configured. Add one to grant sxPanel permission presets to Discord roles.
discord_bot.mapping_no_presets: No permission presets are available yet. Create one in Admin Manager before saving role mappings here.
discord_bot.role_mapping_desc: Link Discord roles to sxPanel permission presets for linked admins. If an admin matches multiple mappings, all matched preset permissions are merged and synced onto their admin account.
discord_bot.status_embed_desc: The server status embed is customizable by editing the two JSONs above. You can add live server stats, occupancy, recent join/leave counts, and the rendered player list through placeholders.
discord_bot.status_embed_note: Use the command /status add on a channel that the bot has the "Send Message" permission to setup the embed.
discord_bot.player_list_embed_desc: The live player list embed is customizable by editing the two JSONs above.
discord_bot.player_list_embed_note: Use the command /players add on a channel that the bot has the "Send Message" permission to setup the embed.
discord_bot.toast_token_required: You must provide a Discord Bot Token to enable the bot.
discord_bot.toast_guild_required: You must provide a Server ID to enable the bot.
discord_bot.toast_mapping_label_required: Each Discord role mapping needs a label.
discord_bot.toast_mapping_roles_required: Each Discord role mapping needs at least one Discord role ID.
discord_bot.toast_mapping_preset_required: Each Discord role mapping needs a permission preset.

playerlist.clear_filter_hint: Clear the filter to show all players.
playerlist.invite_friends_hint: Invite some friends to join in!

insights.page_description: Long-term server trends, player analytics and moderation history

population.title: Population
population.description: How your player base evolves over time

sessions.title: Sessions & Engagement
sessions.description: What players do once they're connected

player_count.title: Player Count & Memory
player_count.subtitle: Long-term population and host memory trend

playtime_dist.title: Playtime Distribution
playtime_dist.subtitle: How much total time players accumulate

moderation.title: Moderation Activity
moderation.subtitle: Warns, kicks, bans and more over time

daily_players.title: New vs Returning Players
daily_players.subtitle: Daily breakdown of who showed up

analytics.ticket_queue_desc: Current status breakdown of all tickets.
analytics.staff_performance_desc: All-time response and resolution metrics, plus the leaderboard.

ticket_modal.exclude_auto_deletion_desc: Keep this ticket when the retention cleanup prunes old resolved and closed tickets.
ticket_modal.reenabled_toast: Ticket will follow the retention policy again.
ticket_modal.delete_message: This permanently deletes %{id}. This cannot be undone.
ticket_modal.title: Ticket %{id}

players.label: Whitelisted players
players.subtitle: Everyone approved to join who has connected at least once.

requests.label: Join requests
requests.subtitle: Players who tried to connect but are not whitelisted yet.

approvals.label: Pending approvals
approvals.subtitle: Pre-approved identifiers consumed automatically on first connect.

whitelist.search_players: Search by name, identifier, or staff…
whitelist.search_requests: Search by ID, name, or Discord tag…
whitelist.page_subtitle: Manage approved players, review join requests, and pre-approve identifiers.

prompts.kick_message: Type the kick reason or leave it blank (press enter)
prompts.warn_offline_hint: Offline players will receive the warning when they come back online.
prompts.warn_placeholder: The reason for the warn, rule violated, etc.
prompts.delete_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete %{name} from the database?
prompts.delete_detail: This will remove all their data including play time, join date, notes, and identifier history.

spectate.title: Live Spectate: %{name}
spectate.timeout: Connection timed out — no frames received from the player.

info.notes_placeholder: Type your notes about the player.
info.notes_unregistered: Cannot set notes for players that are not registered.

ban.no_permission: You don't have permission to ban players.
ban.reason_min_length: The reason must be at least 3 characters long.
ban.reason_placeholder: The reason for the ban, rule violated, etc.
ban.no_templates: You do not have any template configured.

insights.not_registered: Player is not registered in the database yet.

edit.title: Change Duration
edit.description: Set a new duration for this ban. The expiration will be recalculated from now.
edit.revoked_warning: This ban has been revoked. The duration cannot be changed.

modify.revoke_description: This is generally done when the player successfully appeals the %{type} or the admin regrets issuing it.
modify.revoke_ban_rejoin: The player will be able to rejoin the server.
modify.revoke_no_notify: The player will not be notified of the revocation.
modify.revoke_stays_history: This %{type} will not be removed from the player history.
modify.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this %{type}?
modify.delete_irreversible: This will remove it from the player's history entirely and cannot be undone.
modify.delete_section_description: Permanently removes this %{type} from the database.
modify.delete_removed_history: This will be removed from the player's history entirely.

password.temp_warning: Your account has a temporary password that needs to be changed before you can use this web panel.
password.temp_note: Make sure to take note of your new password before saving.
password.description: You can use your password to login to the sxPanel interface even without using the Cfx.re login button.

identifiers.description: The identifiers are optional for accessing the Web Panel but required for you to be able to use the In Game Menu and the Discord Bot.
identifiers.recommended: It is recommended that you configure at least one.
identifiers.fivem_help: Your identifier can be found by clicking in your name in the playerlist and going to the IDs page.
identifiers.fivem_forum: You can also type in your forum.cfx.re username and it will be converted automatically.
identifiers.fivem_required: This is required if you want to login using the Cfx.re button.
identifiers.discord_help: You can get your Discord User ID by following this guide.
identifiers.discord_required: This is required if you want to use the Discord Bot slash commands.
identifiers.forum_not_found: Could not find the user in the forum. Make sure you typed the username correctly.
identifiers.forum_api_failed: Failed to check the identifiers on the forum API.

two_factor.required_warning: Your server requires two-factor authentication. Enable 2FA below to use the web panel and in-game menu.
two_factor.status_description: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a code from your authenticator app when logging in.
two_factor.setup_description: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.), then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
two_factor.qr_unavailable: QR code unavailable. Enter the key manually below.
two_factor.manual_key: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
two_factor.backup_warning: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once. You won't be able to see them again.
two_factor.disable_description: To disable two-factor authentication, enter your current password and a 2FA code.

api_errors.no_permission: You don't have permission to perform this action.
api_errors.player_not_connected: This player is not connected to the server.

settings.no_permission_view: You do not have permission to view the settings.

player_action.no_permission: You don't have permission to execute this action.
player_action.empty_message: Cannot send a direct message with an empty message.
player_action.warn_stdin_failed: Warn saved, but likely failed to send the warn in game.
player_action.ban_stdin_failed: Player banned, but likely failed to kick player.

player_screenshot.no_permission: You don't have permission to execute this action.

all_permissions.label: All Permissions
all_permissions.description: Root permission — grants every other permission.

manage_admins.label: Manage Admins
manage_admins.description: Create, edit, and delete admin accounts.

txadmin_log_view.label: View System Logs
txadmin_log_view.description: View sxPanel system and admin action logs.

console_write.label: Console: Write
console_write.description: Execute commands in the FXServer console.

control_server.label: Start / Stop / Restart Server
control_server.description: Start, stop, restart the FXServer and scheduler.

server_cfg_editor.label: server.cfg Editor
server_cfg_editor.description: Read and write the server.cfg file.

menu_vehicle_spawn.label: Spawn Vehicles
menu_vehicle_spawn.description: Spawn vehicles via the in-game menu.

menu_vehicle_fix.label: Fix Vehicles
menu_vehicle_fix.description: Repair vehicles via the in-game menu.

menu_vehicle_boost.label: Boost Vehicles
menu_vehicle_boost.description: Boost vehicles via the in-game menu.

menu_vehicle_delete.label: Delete Vehicles
menu_vehicle_delete.description: Delete vehicles via the in-game menu.

menu_clear_area.label: Reset World Area
menu_clear_area.description: Reset a world area via the in-game menu.

menu_mapblips.label: View Map Blips
menu_mapblips.description: See all players on the in-game map via map blips.

players_teleport.label: Teleport
players_teleport.description: Teleport self or bring/go to players.

players_troll.label: Troll Actions
players_troll.description: Use the troll menu on players.

manage_tickets.label: Manage Tickets
manage_tickets.description: Delete any ticket at any time.

players_delete.label: Remove Player Data
players_delete.description: Delete bans/warns, players, and player identifiers.

warning_bar.socket_lost_desc: The connection to the sxPanel server has been lost.
warning_bar.socket_lost_restart: If you closed FXServer, please restart it.
warning_bar.tx_outdated_title: This version of sxPanel is outdated.
warning_bar.tx_patch_title: A patch (bug fix) update is available for sxPanel.
warning_bar.tx_outdated_desc: Version v%{version} has been released bringing new features, bug fixes and improvements.
warning_bar.tx_patch_desc: If you are experiencing any kind of issue, please update to v%{version}.
warning_bar.fx_outdated_title: This version of FXServer is outdated.
warning_bar.fx_update_title: An update is available for FXServer.

addon_warning.title: Addons need attention
addon_warning.awaiting_and_reapproval: %{newCount} addon(s) awaiting approval and %{reapprovalCount} needing re-approval.
addon_warning.reapproval_only: %{count} addon(s) updated with new permissions — re-approval required.

system_action.label: Panel Action Logs
system_action.description: Log panel-side actions, moderation activity, and ticket workflow events.

whitelist.label: Whitelist Logs
whitelist.description: Log whitelist applications, approvals, grants, and revocations.

system_command.label: Panel Command Logs
system_command.description: Log server control commands and live console commands executed through sxPanel.

system_config.label: Config Change Logs
system_config.description: Log configuration changes saved through sxPanel.

system_monitor.label: Monitor Logs
system_monitor.description: Log monitor events such as restarts, crash handling, and health alerts.

system_scheduler.label: Scheduler Logs
system_scheduler.description: Log scheduled actions handled by the server scheduler.

system_system.label: System Logs
system_system.description: Log other sxPanel system events that do not fall into a more specific category.

server_menu.label: Admin Command Logs
server_menu.description: Log in-game admin menu actions such as noclip, teleport, heal, spectate, vehicle tools, and troll actions.

nui_reports.new_ticket_click: New ticket from %{name} — click to view
nui_reports.menu_what: What would you like to do?
nui_reports.no_messages_player: No messages yet. An admin will respond to your ticket.
nui_reports.no_messages_admin: No messages yet. Send a reply below.
nui_reports.select_ticket_hint: Select a ticket to view details

errors.message_required: Message must have content or an image
errors.rate_limited: You are submitting too fast. Please wait a moment and try again.

server.tickets_disabled: Support tickets are disabled on this server.
server.reports_disabled: Reports are disabled on this server.

whitelist_pending.title: Not Whitelisted
whitelist_pending.body: Please join {guildName} and request to be whitelisted.

whitelist_pending.message: Join {guildName} and submit a whitelist request. Staff may ask for your request ID below.
